questions.question:
A Deployment named `private-api` in namespace `registry-auth-lab` is failing because its pull-secret wiring to the ServiceAccount is wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- it uses ServiceAccount `puller`
- the Deployment imagePullSecrets contains `regcred`
- the image reference remains `busybox:1.36`
- the existing Secret `regcred` keeps type `kubernetes.io/dockerconfigjson`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running Pod uses ServiceAccount `puller` and imagePullSecret `regcred`

Do not create a replacement Secret. Fix the Deployment to use the existing pull credentials.

verification.description: Deployment private-api uses the intended ServiceAccount, imagePullSecret, image reference, and existing Secret type
Deployment private-api becomes Available after the pull-secret wiring is repaired
The running Pod uses ServiceAccount puller and imagePullSecret regcred
